homepage.heroSubline: Premium installation and replacement services. Protecting your view, one window at a time.
aboutText: Custom Doors Co was founded over a decade ago with a simple goal: to provide San Francisco homeowners and businesses with unparalleled window and door solutions. We started as a small, family-run operation, and while we've grown, our commitment to quality craftsmanship and personalized service remains unchanged.

Our approach is rooted in understanding your unique needs and challenges. We don't believe in one-size-fits-all solutions. Instead, we meticulously assess each project, offering tailored recommendations and employing proven techniques to ensure lasting performance and aesthetic appeal. We stand behind our work, guaranteeing your satisfaction.

We are deeply invested in the San Francisco community. We source materials locally whenever possible, support local initiatives, and strive to minimize our environmental impact. We believe in building strong relationships with our clients and contributing to the vibrant fabric of this city.

homepage.ctaSubline: Request a free consultation and discover the perfect window and door solutions for your property.

services.name: Window Installation
services.shortDescription: Seamless window installation for enhanced energy efficiency and curb appeal.
services.description:
Proper window installation is crucial in San Francisco, where the microclimates can range from foggy and damp to sunny and warm within a few miles. Our expert team ensures a perfect fit, eliminating drafts, preventing water damage, and maximizing energy efficiency. We handle all types of windows, from classic double-hung to modern casement and picture windows. We begin with a thorough assessment of your existing window openings, taking precise measurements and accounting for any structural irregularities. 

Our installation process involves careful removal of your old windows, proper flashing and sealing to prevent leaks, and precise fitting of the new windows. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring that all windows are level, plumb, and secure. We also provide thorough cleanup and disposal of old materials, leaving your property clean and tidy. 

Whether you're replacing a single broken window or upgrading all the windows in your home, we deliver exceptional results. We work with a variety of window materials, including wood, vinyl, aluminum, and fiberglass, and we can help you choose the best option for your budget and aesthetic preferences. Trust Custom Doors Co for window installs that stand the test of time and weather.

faq.question: How long does window installation typically take?
faq.answer: The duration of window installation depends on the number of windows and the complexity of the project. A typical installation can take anywhere from a few hours to a few days.

faq.question: What type of windows are best for San Francisco's climate?
faq.answer: Windows with Low-E coatings and argon gas fills are ideal for San Francisco's climate, as they provide excellent insulation and UV protection. Vinyl and fiberglass frames are also durable and weather-resistant.

faq.question: Do you offer a warranty on your window installations?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a comprehensive warranty on both our materials and workmanship. Please contact us for specific details regarding our warranty coverage.

services.name: Door Installation
services.shortDescription: Secure and stylish door installation for your home or business.
services.description:
A properly installed door is more than just an entryway; it's a crucial element of your home's security, energy efficiency, and curb appeal. Custom Doors Co offers expert door installation services in San Francisco, ensuring a perfect fit and long-lasting performance. We handle all types of doors, including entry doors, patio doors, sliding doors, and interior doors. 

Our experienced installers carefully remove your old door, prepare the opening, and install the new door with precision. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring that the door is properly aligned, sealed, and secured. We also install all necessary hardware, such as locks, handles, and hinges, ensuring smooth and reliable operation.

We understand the unique challenges of door installation in San Francisco, where older homes often have uneven frames and unique architectural features. Our team is skilled at working with these challenges, providing custom solutions to ensure a seamless and professional installation. Whether you're looking to upgrade your front door for added security or install a new patio door for better access to your outdoor space, we've got you covered. We work with a wide range of door materials, including wood, fiberglass, steel, and composite, and we can help you choose the best option for your needs and budget.
process: Step 2: Old Door Removal & Frame Preparation

faq.question: What are the benefits of installing a new front door?
faq.answer: A new front door can improve your home's security, energy efficiency, and curb appeal. It can also increase your home's value and create a more welcoming entrance.

faq.question: How do I choose the right door for my home?
faq.answer: When choosing a door, consider factors such as your budget, style preferences, security needs, and energy efficiency goals. Our team can help you explore your options and make the best choice for your home.

faq.question: What type of warranty do you offer on door installations?
faq.answer: We offer a comprehensive warranty on our door installations, covering both materials and labor. Please contact us for more details.

services.name: Window Replacement
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your home with energy-efficient window replacement services.
services.description:
Is it time to replace those old, drafty windows? Custom Doors Co offers professional window replacement services in San Francisco, helping you improve your home's energy efficiency, comfort, and value. We understand the unique challenges of window replacement in older San Francisco homes, from dealing with lead paint to navigating complex building codes. 

Our experienced team will carefully remove your old windows, dispose of them properly, and install energy-efficient replacements that meet the latest building standards. We offer a wide selection of window styles and materials to choose from, including vinyl, wood, fiberglass, and aluminum. We can help you select the best windows for your budget, style, and performance needs. 

Replacing your old windows can significantly reduce your energy bills, improve your home's insulation, and reduce noise pollution. It can also enhance your home's curb appeal and increase its resale value. Whether you're looking to replace a few broken windows or upgrade all the windows in your home, we're here to help. We are committed to providing quality workmanship, exceptional customer service, and competitive pricing.
process: Step 3: Safe Removal of Old Windows

faq.question: How do I know if I need to replace my windows?
faq.answer: Signs that you may need to replace your windows include drafts, condensation, difficulty opening or closing, and visible damage to the frames or glass.

faq.question: What are the benefits of energy-efficient windows?
faq.answer: Energy-efficient windows can help reduce your energy bills, improve your home's insulation, and reduce noise pollution. They can also make your home more comfortable and increase its value.

faq.question: Do you handle lead paint abatement during window replacement?
faq.answer: Yes, we are certified to handle lead paint abatement during window replacement. We follow strict safety protocols to protect our workers and your family.

services.name: Door Replacement
services.shortDescription: Upgrade the entrance to your home with our professional door replacement services.
services.description:
Custom Doors Co provides expert door replacement services throughout San Francisco. A new door can drastically improve your home's security, energy efficiency, and aesthetic appeal. Whether your existing door is damaged, outdated, or simply not performing as it should, our team can help you select and install the perfect replacement.

We offer a wide variety of door styles and materials, including entry doors, patio doors, sliding doors, and interior doors. We work with wood, fiberglass, steel, and composite materials to provide options for every budget and design preference. Our skilled technicians ensure a precise fit and proper installation, paying close attention to details like weatherstripping and hardware.

Door replacement isn't just about aesthetics; it's also about security and energy savings. Modern doors offer enhanced security features and improved insulation, helping to keep your home safe and comfortable year-round. We'll assess your needs and recommend the best door options to meet your specific requirements. From initial consultation to final installation, we're dedicated to providing exceptional service and quality workmanship.
process: Step 3: Removal of Old Door & Frame Preparation

faq.question: How long does a typical door replacement take?
faq.answer: A standard door replacement can usually be completed in a single day. More complex installations may require additional time.

faq.question: What are the most energy-efficient door options?
faq.answer: Fiberglass and steel doors with insulated cores are among the most energy-efficient options. Look for doors with high R-values for optimal insulation.

faq.question: Do you offer custom door designs?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer custom door designs to match your unique style and architectural preferences. Contact us to discuss your specific needs.

services.name: Patio Door Installation
services.shortDescription: Expand your living space with expert patio door installation.
services.description:
Transform your indoor-outdoor living experience with a new patio door from Custom Doors Co. We specialize in the installation of high-quality patio doors that seamlessly connect your home to your outdoor space. Whether you're looking for sliding glass doors, French doors, or bi-folding doors, our team has the expertise to handle any project.

We understand the unique challenges of patio door installation, including ensuring proper sealing, smooth operation, and enhanced security. Our experienced installers will carefully remove your old door, prepare the opening, and install your new patio door with precision. We pay close attention to detail, ensuring that your new door is perfectly aligned and operates smoothly.

A new patio door can dramatically improve your home's aesthetics, energy efficiency, and functionality. It can also increase natural light and create a more inviting atmosphere. We offer a wide range of patio door styles and materials to choose from, and we can help you select the best option for your home's style and your personal preferences. From initial consultation to final installation, we're committed to providing exceptional service and quality workmanship.
process: Step 3: Removal of Old Door & Frame Preparation

faq.question: What are the different types of patio doors available?
faq.answer: We offer a variety of patio door styles, including sliding glass doors, French doors, and bi-folding doors. Each style offers unique benefits and aesthetic appeal.

faq.question: How do I choose the right patio door for my home?
faq.answer: Consider factors such as your budget, style preferences, space constraints, and energy efficiency goals. Our team can help you explore your options and make the best choice for your home.

faq.question: Do you offer a warranty on your patio door installations?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a comprehensive warranty on our patio door installations, covering both materials and labor. Please contact us for more details.

services.name: Custom Window Design
services.shortDescription: Unique window designs tailored to your home's architectural style.
services.description:
For homeowners seeking a truly personalized touch, Custom Doors Co offers custom window design services. We collaborate with you to create unique window solutions that perfectly complement your home's architectural style and your individual taste. Whether you're looking for unusual shapes, custom sizes, or specific materials, our team can bring your vision to life.

We start with a detailed consultation to understand your design goals and budget. Our experienced designers will then create detailed drawings and specifications for your custom windows. We work closely with our manufacturing partners to ensure that your windows are built to the highest standards of quality and precision.

Custom windows can add a distinctive touch to your home, enhancing its curb appeal and increasing its value. They can also provide unique lighting and ventilation options. Whether you're renovating an existing home or building a new one, our custom window design services can help you create a truly one-of-a-kind living space. We pride ourselves on our ability to deliver innovative solutions that meet the most demanding requirements.

faq.question: What types of materials can be used for custom windows?
faq.answer: We can create custom windows using a variety of materials, including wood, vinyl, aluminum, and fiberglass. Each material offers unique benefits in terms of aesthetics, durability, and energy efficiency.

faq.question: How long does it take to design and install custom windows?
faq.answer: The timeline for custom window design and installation depends on the complexity of the project. We'll provide you with a detailed timeline during the initial consultation.

faq.question: What is the cost of custom window design and installation?
faq.answer: The cost of custom window design and installation varies depending on the size, shape, materials, and complexity of the project. We'll provide you with a detailed quote after the initial consultation.

serviceAreas.content:
Custom Doors Co is proud to provide top-quality window and door installation services to homeowners and businesses throughout San Francisco. From the iconic Victorian homes of Alamo Square to the modern high-rises downtown, we understand the unique architectural styles and needs of San Francisco properties.

Our experienced team is dedicated to providing exceptional craftsmanship and customer service. We offer a wide selection of windows and doors to suit any style and budget, and we're committed to helping you find the perfect solutions to enhance the beauty, energy efficiency, and security of your San Francisco home or business. We are familiar with the specific building codes and requirements of San Francisco and will ensure your project is completed correctly and efficiently.

We understand the specific needs of properties in San Francisco, from dealing with the fog to adhering to strict building codes.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Custom Doors Co replaced all the windows in my Victorian home in the Mission District. They were incredibly respectful of the original architecture and did a fantastic job matching the new windows to the existing style. The team was professional, efficient, and cleaned up everything thoroughly. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: Had Custom Doors Co install a new front door in my condo in North Beach. The installation was quick, and the door looks great. There was a slight delay in getting the hardware, but they communicated clearly throughout the process. Overall, a good experience.

reviews.name: Jennifer L.
reviews.text: We hired Custom Doors Co to install a new sliding patio door in our Sunset District home. They did an amazing job! The door slides smoothly, and the new weatherstripping has made a huge difference in keeping the fog out. The installers were friendly and professional.

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: Custom Doors Co installed new windows in our office building downtown. The crew was efficient and minimized disruption to our business. The new windows look great and have significantly reduced the noise from the street. A great company to work with!

reviews.name: Susan T.
reviews.text: Replaced our back door with Custom Doors Co. They were very helpful in choosing a secure and stylish option. The installation was a bit tricky due to an old frame, but they handled it with skill. Happy with the result.

reviews.name: Robert P.
reviews.text: We wanted unique windows for our renovated loft in SOMA. Custom Doors Co designed and installed stunning custom windows that perfectly capture our vision. The quality of the craftsmanship is exceptional, and the windows have completely transformed the space.
